ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Alaskan pollock or new Zealand hoki fillets (51%) crumb coating (49%) (wheat flour, water, canola oil, wheat starch, tapioca starch, potato starch, salt, glucose, wheat gluten, yeast, chia flour, sugar, black pepper).
